emails.subject: RE: PG&E Core Master
emails.body: Barry, I'm trying to see if we can do it from 10 11 a.m. (Houston time) on Tuesday. Is this time slot good for you? Can you also give me some other times on Tuesday (just in case one of the other participants can't do 10 -11)? Thanks, S To: Crawford, Sharon

emails.subject: RE: PG&E Core Master
emails.body: RE: PG&E Core Master I am available from 1:30 2:30 Houston time. BT

emails.subject: RE: PG&E Core Master
emails.body: Thanks, Barry. Please block that time for the conference call and I will e-mail the participants with the dial in number. Sharon
